Bash(cd "D:/桌面/项目/心偶/提示词" && python3 -c "
import zipfile, re, sys
for fname in ['00基础设定.docx', '00工作模式.docx', '【家庭】场景模块.docx']:
    print\('='*60\)
    print\(f'FILE: {fname}'\)
    print\('='*60\)
    try:
        with zipfile.ZipFile\(fname\) as z:
            with z.open\('word/document.xml'\) as f:
                content = f.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)
                text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', content\)
                text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\).strip\(\)
                print\(text[:3000]\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1 || python -c "
import zipfile, re, sys
for fname in ['00基础设定.docx', '00工作模式.docx', '【家庭】场景模块.docx']:
    print\('='*60\)
    print\(f'FILE: {fname}'\)
    print\('='*60\)
    try:
        with zipfile.ZipFile\(fname\) as z:
            with z.open\('word/document.xml'\) as f:
                content = f.read\(\).decode\('utf-8'\)
                text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', content\)
                text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\).strip\(\)
                print\(text[:3000]\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
    print\(\)
")
